title: storage — PHP attribute contracts
description: Four attributes. Discovered at build time by CompileStorageRegistries. The compiler maps class properties + classes into the FileKindRegistry so runtime enforcement is a hash-map lookup, not a reflection call.

attributes.name: Attachable
attributes.description: Declares that the annotated model member is a file-attachment surface. Runtime: the HasFiles trait exposes accessors that resolve to this kind. Multiple #[Attachable] on the same model = multiple file surfaces (e.g. a User with avatar + cover_photo).

params.name: kind
params.description: The file kind key from FileKindRegistry. Enforces mime + max_size + variants.

params.name: single
params.description: True = at most one File per (model, kind); a second upload replaces the first. False = many Files per kind (photo galleries, document sets).

params.name: on_replace
params.description: When single=true and a new file is attached to replace an existing one: archive (SoftDeletes the old row + keeps blob in cold storage until retention window) or hard_delete (immediate byte removal, no recovery).

params.name: public_wire_key
params.description: Wire projection key. Default = method/property name. Override when the wire contract differs (e.g. property `profilePicture` but wire key `avatar_url`).

attributes.name: FileKind
attributes.description: Registers a file kind with FileKindRegistry. A file kind bundles mime allow-list + max size + variant recipe + antivirus + retention. Kinds are DECLARED by whichever module owns the attaching entity (e.g. `user` declares `avatar`, `subscription` declares `plan_cover`). The compiler ensures no two modules declare the same kind key.

params.name: key
params.description: Kind slug. Convention: lowercase snake_case, module-namespaced when the kind is module-specific (e.g. `newsletter_hero`).

params.name: max_size_mb
params.description: Per-file cap. Enforced by the storage.size.validate middleware.

params.name: allowed_mimes
params.description: MIME allowlist. e.g. ['image/jpeg', 'image/png', 'image/webp']. Wildcards not allowed — explicit list only.

params.name: generates_variants
params.description: Variant keys to generate async on upload. Recipes registered via #[GeneratesVariants] on separate classes.

params.name: requires_virus_scan
params.description: Enable AV scan on upload. Default true. Rare exception: platform-internal system uploads may set false (with justification in the class docblock).

params.name: visibility
params.description: Default visibility for uploads of this kind. `workspace` = readable by any workspace member; `restricted` = readable only by the owner + workspace admin; `public` = publicly accessible via unsigned URL (rare, requires explicit workspace admin config).

params.name: dedupable
params.description: Whether uploads of this kind participate in content-addressable dedup. Set false for cryptographically sensitive files where two workspaces MUST NOT share physical bytes.

params.name: retention_days
params.description: Kind-specific retention override. Null = inherit workspace default. Numeric = purge N days after archived_at.

attributes.example:
#[FileKind(
    key: 'avatar',
    max_size_mb: 5,
    allowed_mimes: ['image/jpeg', 'image/png', 'image/webp'],
    generates_variants: ['thumbnail', 'medium'],
    requires_virus_scan: true,
    visibility: 'workspace',
)]
final class Avatar {}

attributes.name: GeneratesVariants
attributes.description: Requests async variant generation on upload. When applied to a property, layers on top of the property's #[Attachable]. When applied to a class, applies to every attachable property on that class.

params.name: variants
params.description: Variant keys to generate. Each key must resolve to a registered variant recipe via VariantRegistry.

attributes.name: RequiresVirusScan
attributes.description: Explicitly requires virus scanning on upload. Every kind requires scan by default; this attribute pins the requirement at the property level for readability + audit clarity. Redundant with `#[FileKind(requires_virus_scan: true)]`.

variant_recipes.description: Variants are declared separately via classes that implement Academorix\Storage\Contracts\VariantRecipe. The recipe declares its transformer (image resize, PDF thumbnail extraction, video keyframe) + output MIME + output settings. Registered in the container via the VariantRegistry binding.
